positive.prompt: Where do I record this project learning so future agents see it?
Promote this local auto-memory fact into the repo
Save what we learned about the build system as durable committed memory

negative.prompt: Wire this repo up with the standard workflows and settings
What branch discipline applies before I merge this?

evals.prompt: We just learned the staging deploy needs a manual cache flush every time. Make sure no future session loses this.
evals.expected_output: A fact file under docs/memory/ plus an index line, committed to the repo
expectations: The fact is written under docs/memory/, not into a local-only store
The memory index is updated to point at the new fact file
The fact records why, not just what
